articles.title: Solana Saga phone sells for $5,000 on eBay as BONK hype continues
articles.description: The phones, which come with an airdrop of BONK tokens, were initially deemed a failure. Now they're reselling for $2,000 and up.

articles.title: Shiba Inu Team Carries Out Massive SHIB Burn, Triggers 779,000% Spike
articles.description: Data from Shibburn, the burn tracker on Shiba Inu’s ecosystem, has shown a massive 779,000% spike in the number of SHIB tokens burnt in the past 24 hours. A new record for the most 24-hour burn may have just been set, as data shows more than 8 billion SHIB tokens recently made their way into […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Hash War Coming: Analyst Shares as Bitcoin NFTs Grow
articles.description: Bitcoin analyst MDB discusses Bitcoin NFTs' impact, questioning their innovation and potential to stress test the Bitcoin network.
